No Poverty.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the syllabus directly links management concepts to poverty eradication or its specific targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or inferred content related to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course syllabus does not contain any explicit or inferred content related to health, well-being, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and focuses on developing relevant management skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or inferred content related to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or inferred content related to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course aims to improve operational efficiency for economic growth (Target 8.2) and covers HR management and motivation, crucial for decent work (Targets 8.3, 8.5, 8.8).
